tests.name: T01-极早打断不应显示No response requested

args: 请用5000字详细分析量子力学的哲学意义

(() => { const msgs = window.__tokenicode_test.getMessages({summary: false}).messages; const bad = msgs.filter(m => m.role === 'assistant' && m.type === 'text' && m.content && m.content.includes('No response requested')); return bad.length === 0 ? 'clean' : 'FOUND:' + bad.map(m => m.content.slice(0,80)).join('|'); })()
